series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence regarding reports of unusual incidents on Taxation premisies throughout the state; e.g., thefts, fires, threats, injuries, disorderly conduct, ect. Correspondences may include Incident Reports, accident/illness reports (ADM 4303), safety reports (OSHA 300), Police/Fire reports, witness statements, ect., as applicable.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
